title: Query intelligence needs an explicit query-plan contract before learned fusion
impact: Term-count and keyword/centroid heuristics are stable but not enough for paraphrase, ambiguity, or learned routing diagnostics.

title: Memory search has local fusion signals but lacks shared evaluation telemetry
impact: Channel contribution, candidate survival, and final answer policy should be logged together.

title: Weak-quality refusal contracts are strong enough to preserve during optimization
impact: Rerank or learned fusion should not bypass ask/refuse decisions.
